scripts.prebuild: if not exist www mkdir www && copy /Y index.html www\index.html && copy /Y manifest.json www\manifest.json && copy /Y sw.js www\sw.js && if not exist www\assets xcopy /E /I assets www\assets
scripts.cap:sync: npm run prebuild && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:android: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open android
scripts.cap:ios: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open ios
